title: salvia lusitanica
intro: Salvia lusitanica, also known as blue sage, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salvia lusitanica include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Salvia lusitanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
